content.full_text:
May 16, 1990

John Rothman
FPPC
PO Box 807
Sacramento, Ca 95804

Dear Mr. Rothman,

Following up our phone conversation I am requesting copies of any advice the FPPC has given concerning statements of economic interest to be filed by law firms or attorneys that are employed by a public agency.

In the case that I am interested in, our housing commission hires a law firm to be general counsel. It does not file an SEI, but one of its attorneys does. However, he does not list clients who pay over $10,000 to him or the law firm. His reason is that he does not own 10% of the stock of the law firm.

Thanks for your consideration.

Sincerely,

Melvin Shapiro
